languages.text: Eons of time have impacted this obelisk's durability. It has only 90% Armor and 10 Deflection.

languages.text: Eons of time have chipped away at this obelisk's integrity. It has only 90% of its {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} left and 10 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}.

languages.text: Бессчетные века подточили целостность этого обелиска. У него осталось 90% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}брони{/g} и 10 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}отражения{/g}.

Бессчетные века подточили целостность этого обелиска. У него осталось 90% {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}брони{/g} и 10 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}отражения{/g}.

languages.text: Der Zahn der Zeit nagt an der Integrität dieses Obelisken. Er hat nur noch 90 % seiner {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Rüstung{/g} und 10 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Deflektion{/g}.
languages.original_text: Eons of time have chipped away at this obelisk's integrity. It has only 90% of its {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} left and 10 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Der Zahn der Zeit nagt an der Integrität dieses Obelisken. Er hat nur noch 90 % seiner {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Rüstung{/g} und 10 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Deflektion{/g}.

languages.text: Los eones han pasado factura a la integridad del obelisco. Solo le quedan un 90 % de su {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armadura{/g} y 10 de {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}desvío{/g}.
languages.original_text: Eons of time have chipped away at this obelisk's integrity. It has only 90% of its {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} left and 10 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Los eones han pasado factura a la integridad del obelisco. Solo le quedan un 90 % de su {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armadura{/g} y 10 de {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}desvío{/g}.

languages.text: Çağlardır akıp giden zaman, bu dikili taşı yavaş yavaş kemirip aşındırmış. Dikili taşın {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}zırhının{/g} yalnızca %90'ı ve 10 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}saptırma{/g} değeri kalmış durumda.
languages.original_text: Eons of time have chipped away at this obelisk's integrity. It has only 90% of its {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} left and 10 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Çağlardır akıp giden zaman, bu dikili taşı yavaş yavaş kemirip aşındırmış. Dikili taşın {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}zırhının{/g} yalnızca %90'ı ve 10 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}saptırma{/g} değeri kalmış durumda.

languages.text: 万古光阴剥蚀了这座方尖碑的本体。其{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}护甲{/g}已削弱至90%，{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}偏转值{/g}仅存10点。
languages.original_text: Eons of time have chipped away at this obelisk's integrity. It has only 90% of its {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} left and 10 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 万古光阴剥蚀了这座方尖碑的本体。其{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}护甲{/g}已削弱至90%，{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}偏转值{/g}仅存10点。

languages.text: Les millénaires ont fragilisé cet obélisque. Il ne lui reste que 90 % de son {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Armure{/g} et 10 de {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Déflexion{/g}.
languages.original_text: Eons of time have chipped away at this obelisk's integrity. It has only 90% of its {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} left and 10 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}.

traits.locale_text: Les millénaires ont fragilisé cet obélisque. Il ne lui reste que 90 % de son {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Armure{/g} et 10 de {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}Déflexion{/g}.

languages.text: 何億年もの年月が、このオベリスクの完全性を削り取ってきた。{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}鎧{/g}は90%しか残っておらず、{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}防御{/g}は10しかない。
languages.original_text: Eons of time have chipped away at this obelisk's integrity. It has only 90% of its {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} left and 10 {g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}deflection{/g}.

traits.locale_text: 何億年もの年月が、このオベリスクの完全性を削り取ってきた。{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}鎧{/g}は90%しか残っておらず、{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}防御{/g}は10しかない。
